applicability: Every iOS feature, extension, SDK, analytics or diagnostic path, permission flow, tracking technology, and disclosure that collects, derives, processes, transmits, stores, or deletes product data
exception_policy: Privacy exceptions require designated human privacy or legal authority, exact purpose and data scope, affected processing, compensating controls, owner, expiry, review event, and removal or deletion plan.
rationale: Keep product-data use owned, declared, purpose-bound, minimal, consent-aware, and aligned with platform manifests and human-approved disclosure obligations.
review_cadence: Quarterly and before release when data fields, purposes, recipients, SDKs, tracking, required-reason APIs, retention, consent behavior, or disclosures change.
title: Privacy and Compliance
